# PERF-176 positive: io.Copy inside a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-176-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "io"

func DrainAll(readers []io.Reader, dst io.Writer) error {
	for _, r := range readers {
		// Each call allocates a 32 KiB buffer.
		if _, err := io.Copy(dst, r); err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
